title: Group-buy confirmation did not link back to the group-buy page
observed_behavior: After placing a group-buy order, the confirmation screen did not provide a visible Group Buy button back to the group-buy page.
expected_behavior: The group-buy journey should continue from confirmation to the Group Buy page through a visible button.
reproduction_steps: Click Place Order on the checkout page.
Look for a Group Buy button that returns to the group-buy page.
